title: Agent Olympics Coordination Round Manifest
description: A coordination round is a thin orchestration layer over the single-participant live runner (scripts/live-runner.js). It declares a two-stage A2A event: N worker participants each run a probe task envelope (independent investigation of the same question), then one finalizer participant runs a merge task envelope whose participant-facing input includes the workers' findings. A solo-baseline participant runs the whole task alone for comparison. The orchestrator (scripts/coordination-round.js) reuses the live runner's dispatch/capture/fan-in/redaction/identity logic per stage and emits an A2A-effectiveness record. This is a distinct artifact from schemas/round-manifest.schema.json: it is NOT a round manifest (the orchestrator synthesizes per-stage round manifests from it), so it intentionally does not carry round_id/lifecycle at the top level.

config_kind.description: Discriminator. Marks this file as a coordination round manifest (not a plain round manifest).

coordination_id.description: Stable identifier for this coordination round, e.g. 'coord-round-coord-001-fixture'.

season.description: Season this coordination round belongs to.

round_id.description: Base round id used as the round_id of the per-stage round manifests the orchestrator synthesizes (worker, finalizer, solo stages append a stage suffix to the run directory, never to round_id, so judge-handoff round attribution stays stable).

scoring_rubric.description: Rubric the finalizer's commander report packet is scored against by the existing judge harness (scripts/judge.js). Defaults to the merge envelope's scoring_rubric when omitted.

task_type.description: taskType used in the emitted A2A-effectiveness record. Defaults to read_only_no_change_audit (coordination drills are source-only, no change).

mode.description: A2A-effectiveness taxonomy mode. team1: workers independently produce evidence and one finalizer selects/closes. a2a_crosscheck: finalizer does the work and workers audit it.

worker_probe.description: The probe task envelope each worker runs independently (same question, no shared scratchpad). v2 envelope preferred; oracle_ref/judge_notes_ref are stripped by the live runner before any worker sees the envelope.

merge.description: The merge task envelope the finalizer runs. Its participant-facing input is augmented with a worker-reports evidence file built from worker participant-facing findings only.

workers.description: Worker participants. Each runs the worker_probe envelope through the live runner once.

finalizer.description: Finalizer participant. Runs the merge envelope once, ingesting the workers' findings as participant-facing evidence.

solo_baseline.description: Solo-baseline participant. Runs the whole task (merge envelope, no injected worker findings) alone, for the was-delegation-worth-it comparison.

task_id.description: Task id this stage runs. Matches a Season fixture and envelope.

envelope_path.description: Path to the task envelope YAML for this stage.

runtime.description: Registered runtime; must equal adapter (the live runner's runtime_identity gate enforces this).

adapter.description: Adapter class dispatched by the live runner, e.g. 'hermes', 'stub'.

command.description: local_exec argv template handed to the live runner. Same placeholder set the runner allows: {envelope}, {run_dir}, {agent_id}, {run_id}, {task_id}, {round_id}, {time_limit_minutes}, {seed}. No shell strings.
